Day advanced to 2026-03-22.
5,783 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
21 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 5 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-23): ['262505', '698278', '494140', '757107', '912807']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

- "Through which country's intermediaries will Donald Trump's 15-point plan be conveyed to Iran by March 25, 2026?" → Pakistan
- "From which city will the flight involved in the ground-vehicle collision during landing at a New York airport have departed by March 23, 2026?" → Montreal
- "Which news organization’s journalists will be surrounded by local residents while covering a suspected arson attack in North London, as publicly identified by 31 March 2026?" → Al Jazeera
- "Which town in southern Lebanon will be named as the place where a mosque minaret is blown up by March 24, 2026?" → Khiam
- "Which air force will the crashed plane be reported as belonging to by March 24, 2026?" → Colombian air force

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (309 resolved, 21 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
